prompt: I need a simple REST API for a todo app with user auth. Use Express and SQLite. Should have signup, login, CRUD for todos, and each user can only see their own todos. Make sure there are tests and everything is linted.

assertions.text: Output includes a clear decomposition into 3+ sub-projects with dependency ordering
Output identifies which sub-projects can run in parallel vs sequential
Output assigns specific agent types (coder, test-runner, lint-quality, reviewer) to sub-projects
Output explicitly mentions running quality gates (tests, lint, review) before completion
Output includes state updates to superx-state.json or equivalent progress tracking
Output addresses auth security (password hashing, JWT, protected routes) not just CRUD
